---
title: "unblock.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\.agents\skills\unblock.py"
loc: 39
complexity: 9
logic_score: 2.07
style_score: 3.63
intel_score: 3.45
overall_score: 2.24
---

## Intent
The `unblock.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on main. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via main. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 2.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.5/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 7 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)

### Exports
- `main`
